home.tagline: Learn piano, one note at a time
home.subtitle: Interactive theory, microphone validation, guided fingering and real repertoire to practice.

feature.theoryDesc: Notes, scales and chords explained visually and interactively.
feature.micDesc: Play your real piano and the app detects whether you nailed the note.
feature.fingersDesc: We show which finger (1–5) to use on each key.
feature.challengesDesc: Short activities that earn XP and keep your streak alive.
feature.fallingDesc: Practice melodies Synthesia-style, at your own pace.
feature.repertoireDesc: From Chopin to film themes, with adjustable tempo.

home.privacyNote: The microphone is processed 100% in your browser. No audio is ever sent to a server.

theory.title: Music theory
theory.subtitle: Short lessons to build your foundations.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Small, progressive activities. Earn stars and keep your streak.
challenges.playAnyOctave: Play this note in any octave
challenges.useInput: Use the keyboard, mouse or your microphone
challenges.tooManyTries: Here's the answer. Give it another go!

repertoire.title: Repertoire
repertoire.subtitle: Practice real pieces with falling notes, adjustable tempo and fingering guidance.
repertoire.importDesc: Load a .mid file from your device. It is processed in your browser and never uploaded to any server.
repertoire.waitModeDesc: Waits for you to play the correct note before moving on.
repertoire.noImported: You haven't imported any songs yet.

progress.title: Your progress
progress.subtitle: Track your growth and stay consistent.
progress.empty: Start a lesson or a challenge to see your progress here.
progress.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to erase all your progress?

mic.permissionDenied: Microphone permission denied. Enable it in your browser to use this feature.
mic.notSupported: Your browser does not support audio capture.

miditools.title: Generate MIDI in the browser
miditools.subtitle: Upload an audio file or a Synthesia video and download the .mid directly. Everything is processed in your browser — nothing is sent to any server.
miditools.ytTipBody: We can't access YouTube directly from the browser. Download the audio first with yt-dlp or any web downloader, then upload it here.
miditools.synthesiaBody: Only works with videos showing colored notes falling onto a piano keyboard (Synthesia / Piano Teacher style). For real recordings, use the "Piano recording" tab.
miditools.disclaimerBody: Use only with content you have the rights to, or for personal/educational purposes.
miditools.composeEmpty: Record something to see the notation
